ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sequences" (
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequence */,
  "base" INTEGER /* Base of the sequence (e.g., A, C, G, T) */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the base in the sequence */,
  "baseposition" INTEGER /* Base position in the reference genome */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the sequence at the given position */,
  "log2" REAL /* Log2 of the value */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the genetic sequence file (e.g., FASTA, FASTQ, SAM) */,
  "sequence_type" TEXT /* Type of genetic sequence (e.g., DNA, RNA) */,
  "sequence_length" INTEGER /* Length of the sequence */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score for the sequence */,
  "is_paired_end" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the sequence is paired-end */,
  "reference_genome_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the reference genome table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence the metadata belongs to */,
  "source_organism" TEXT /* Source organism of the sequence (e.g., human, mouse, Arabidopsis) */,
  "sequencing_technology" TEXT /* Sequencing technology used to generate the sequence (e.g., Illumina, PacBio) */,
  "date_sequenced" TEXT /* Date the sequence was generated */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the lab table */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the project table */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the sample from which the sequence was derived */,
  "sequencing_center" TEXT /* The center or facility where the sequencing was performed */,
  "sequencing_run_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the sequencing run */,
  "sequencer_model" TEXT /* The model of the sequencer used */,
  "library_preparation_kit" TEXT /* The kit used for library preparation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_metadata_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_metadata_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES labs ("lab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_metadata_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence the result belongs to */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., alignment, assembly, variant calling) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence in the result (e.g., 0.95) */,
  "pipeline_version" TEXT /* Version of the analysis pipeline used */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Tool or software used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the analysis */,
  "result_format" TEXT /* Format of the result */,
  "result_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the result file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sequence */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sequence was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to access the data */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  "result_size" INTEGER /* Size of the result data accessed */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the access was successful */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the access was not successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labs" (
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Name of the lab */,
  "lab_address" TEXT /* Address of the lab */,
  "lab_email" TEXT /* Email address of the lab */,
  "lab_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the lab */,
  "lab_website" TEXT /* Website of the lab */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "project_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)
